THERE WERE THREE LARGE, STEEL OIL TANKS, EACH ABOUT 20 FEET TALL AND WEIGHING ABOUT 4 TO 5 TONS, THAT WERE DISPLACED DUE TO THE WIND. ONE OF THE TANKS WAS DISPLACED 70 TO 100 YARDS, CLEARING AND DAMAGING AN EIGHT FOOT TALL CHAIN LINK FENCE. A VERY LOCALIZED THUNDERSTORM MICROBURST MAY HAVE CAUSED THIS DAMAGE.
